blocking_findings.title: The frozen Testnet RC Wasm cannot initialise on Mainnet
blocking_findings.detail: contracts/odra-governance-receipt-v3/src/encoding.rs pins CASPER_CHAIN_NAME="casper-test" and the constructor path (derive_deployment_domain, CommonHeader::validate_basic) reverts for any other chain name. A byte-for-byte install of the Testnet RC Wasm on Casper Mainnet therefore cannot be constructed with casper_chain_name="casper", which the release dependency requires. This contradicts 'byte-for-byte the RC Wasm' + 'chain name exactly casper' simultaneously.
blocking_findings.proposed_resolution: Codex resolves one of: (a) the Testnet-RC tag additionally attests a reproducible Mainnet-chain build (identical source except the single chain constant, built with the pinned toolchain, SHA-256 recorded as mainnet_wasm_sha256 with mainnet_wasm_chain_name="casper" in the RC declaration); or (b) the freeze is amended to parameterise the chain constant at build time with both hashes recorded. The prep tooling refuses fail-closed (RC_MAINNET_WASM_UNATTESTED) until the RC declaration carries a Mainnet-chain attestation, and separately refuses if that attestation reuses the Testnet build hash.
blocking_findings.no_file_edited: This lane did not modify contracts/**; the finding is documented only.

blocking_findings.title: shared/envelope_v3.py is Testnet-frozen by design
blocking_findings.detail: shared/envelope_v3.py hard-codes casper-test in _validate_header and derive_deployment_domain, so the shared FULL deriver cannot compute a Mainnet envelope. The canary carries a fresh from-spec implementation (tools/mainnet_canary/encoding.py) with a parameterised chain name, cross-checked byte-for-byte against the frozen shared primitives (encode_fields/blake2b256/length_prefix) and against the immutable G1 golden vectors on every plan. No shared/ change is requested; if Codex later generalises shared/, the crosscheck gains a third full-deriver check for chain casper.

blocking_findings.title: Second disjoint-host public Mainnet RPC endpoint not pinned
blocking_findings.detail: shared/casper_rpc_transport.py's read policy requires two distinct public hosts with disjoint addresses. Only the official https://node.mainnet.casper.network/rpc is pinned (verified live, credential-free, chainspec_name=casper, protocol 2.2.2, observed 2026-07-23T06:45Z). Guessing a second 'official' endpoint would violate the pin policy; Codex must nominate it before dual-endpoint verification is possible.

cli_contract.no_bypass: no --yes/--force/--no-confirm flags exist; no environment variable is read anywhere in the package; broadcast submission is structurally absent in this lane

rc_declaration.supplied_by: Codex, derived from the annotated Testnet-RC tag
rc_declaration.validation: strict field set; all five gates must be true; peeled commit must equal worktree HEAD; tracked tree recomputed clean; Wasm SHA-256 recomputed from the tracked artifact; historical inventory re-hashed file-by-file; chain exactly casper; endpoint exactly the pinned official URL; expected_prequorum_error_message must be the Testnet-RC-measured 'User error: <code>' rendering

public_key_inventory.validation: public halves only; account hashes recomputed from public keys via BLAKE2b-256(algorithm||0x00||raw_key); pairwise-distinct governance roles; source!=recipient; key-file references must sit below /run/secrets/mainnet_canary/ and are never opened; any secret-like content refuses the whole document without echoing it

canary_parameters.supplied_by: Codex from the live governance run
canary_parameters.notes: includes max_amount_motes, the deliberately-tiny cap the derived amount may not exceed

treasury_snapshot_observation.supplied_by: Codex via credential-free public RPC read
treasury_snapshot_observation.freshness: refused when >32 blocks or >600s behind the paired chain-status observation

live_authorization.supplied_by: Codex only, after the Testnet-RC gate is green
live_authorization.notes: fixed mount path; no CLI parameter can relocate it; binds rc_tag, exact plan hash, max_total_motes, per_step_confirmation_required=true

step_observations.supplied_by: Codex via credential-free public RPC readback
step_observations.consumed_by: verify mode; fail-closed evaluators for finalized membership, exact QuorumNotMet refusal, exact envelope acceptance, exact transfer binding

journal_contract.format: append-only JSONL, SHA-256 hash chain (prev_hash + record_hash), fsync before progress
journal_contract.restart_semantics: a step in SIGNED/SUBMITTED/SUBMISSION_UNKNOWN blocks all new economic actions (DUPLICATE_ECONOMIC_ACTION) and only reconciles against its ORIGINAL deploy hash (RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED otherwise); tampering fails load (JOURNAL_TAMPERED)

unsigned_intent_contract.content: domain || canonical JSON {plan_hash, step_id, kind, chain_name, signing_role, signing_account_hash, entry_point, typed_args, expected_outcome}
unsigned_intent_contract.addressing: SHA-256 content address; stage stores <sha256>.unsigned-intent.bin outside artifacts/**
unsigned_intent_contract.rationale: wire-format deploy headers (timestamp/TTL/payment) are chosen only inside the future authorized live lane; the signer must re-derive them from the same plan hash, so no stale signable bytes ever exist in this lane

artifact_lineage.prep_lane_behaviour: stage refuses to write anywhere below artifacts/ (LIVE_ARTIFACTS_UNAVAILABLE_IN_PREP) and refuses protected prefixes outright (CANONICAL_NAMESPACE_PROTECTED); Mainnet supplemental records can never replace canonical/Testnet registry entries

verification_wording: Concordia v3 enforced quorum and the exact approved envelope on Casper Mainnet. After independent readback, Concordia's durable executor submitted one native-CSPR transfer bound to that authorization.
claims_policy: every deployed/verified claim emitted by this lane is BLOCKED_PENDING_LIVE_PROOF; verify mode reports observation_consistent per step and never asserts a Mainnet-verified release state — release claims remain Codex's
dependency_audit: tools/mainnet_canary uses only the Python standard library plus repo-internal shared/ imports for the crosscheck path; no new third-party dependency was added; no Authorization header is ever constructed
statement: NO MAINNET OR TESTNET MUTATION PERFORMED
